CIT.question: What is this person's citizenship status?

choices.text: Born in Puerto Rico, Guam, the U.S. Virgin Islands, or the Northern Marianas

COW.question: What is this person's class of worker?

choices.text: Working for a for-profit private company or organization
Owner of non-incorporated business, professional practice, or farm
Owner of incorporated business, professional practice, or farm
Working without pay in a for-profit family business or farm
Unemployed and last worked 5 years ago or earlier or never worked

DEAR.question: What is this person's hearing status?

DEYE.question: What is this person's vision status?

DREM.question: What is this person's cognition status?

ENG.question: What is this person's ability to speak English?

FER.description: person has given birth within the last year
FER.question: What is this person's person has given birth within the last year?

choices.text: Person has given birth within the last year.
Person has not given birth within the last year.

GCL.question: What is this person's grandparent living with grandchildren?

choices.text: Household includes grandparent living with grandchildren
Household does not include grandparents living with grandchildren

HINS2.description: acquired health insurance directly from an insurance company
HINS2.question: What is this person's acquired health insurance directly from an insurance company?

choices.text: Person has purchased insurance directly from an insurance company

text: Person has not purchased insurance directly from an insurance company (is either uninsured or insured through another source)

JWTR.question: What is this person's means of transportation to work?

LANX.description: language other than English spoken at home
LANX.question: What is this person's language other than English spoken at home?

choices.text: Speaks a language other than English at home.

MAR.question: What is this person's marital status?

MIG.description: mobility status over the last year
MIG.question: What is this person's mobility status over the last year?

choices.text: Lived in the same house one year ago
Lived in a different house, outside the United States and Puerto Rico, one year ago
Lived in a different house in the United States one year ago

MIL.question: What is this person's military service status?

choices.text: On active duty in the past, but not now
Only on active duty for training in Reserved/National Guard

RELP.description: relationship to the reference person in the survey
RELP.question: What is this person's relationship to the reference person in the survey?

SCHL.question: What is this person's highest educational attainment?

choices.text: Some college, 1 or more years, no degree
Professional degree beyond a bachelor's degree

WKHP.description: usual number of hours worked per week

choices.text: N/A (information suppressed for certain area codes)
Suppressed for data year 2018 for select PUMAs

DIS.question: What is this person's disability status?

choices.text: Living with two parents, both employed

Living with Father, and Father is employed
Living with Father, and Father is not employed

choices.text: Other Central and South American languages
